description: Implement a process where the first 5 minutes of ET meetings are spent reading and commenting on pre-reads to allow for more equal participation and airtime

Define clear goals and priorities for cross-functional work, clarify roles and responsibilities, and discuss ways to improve cross-functional communication and awareness to reduce ambiguity, misalignment and gaps given the team's high independence and low manageability
Discuss ways to improve the executive team decision-making process to accommodate the diversity in objective judgement scales
